# addChild(_:)

**Instance Method**

Adds the given object as a child.

## Declaration

```swift
func addChild(_ child: PHASEObject) throws
```

## Parameters

- **child**: The object to add to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEObject/children] array.

## Discussion

This function throws an error if `child` already has a different parent.

## Managing the Hierarchy

- **children**: Objects that position and orient in the scene relative to the given object.
- **parent**: The object that this instance positions and orients relative to in the scene.
- **removeChild(_:)**: Removes the given object as a child.
- **removeChildren()**: Removes all child objects from the given object.
